title: corylopsis himalayana var. griffithii
intro: Corylopsis himalayana var. griffithii is a plant species belonging to the family Hamamelidaceae, commonly known as the Himalayan winter-hazel. It is native to the Himalayas and has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Corylopsis himalayana var. griffithii is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Ayurvedic formulations to support overall health and well-being.
